summary: Enthusiastic listeners praise a beautiful Dark Star and the overall vibe of the show, though no recording‑quality details are given.
review: The consensus among reviewers is that this performance is solid and enjoyable, with the Dark Star standing out as a highlight and even a nod to “Sing Me Back Home.” No reviewer comments on the audio source or fidelity, so the technical side remains undefined while the musical impression is clearly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are 4‑5 stars and focus on strong performance aspects; lack of recording commentary limits certainty but overall sentiment is highly positive.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer mentions soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers do not discuss set structure; they simply note overall enjoyment and highlight Dark Star.
